creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Before I discovered the emulation@ part of the package message, I always assumed that virtualization@ was the relevant public list. 

<https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_activity.cgi?id=252227> might have involved the same assumption. 

Whilst <https://wiki.freebsd.org/VirtualBox> also mentions emulation@, last year I was told that this page is outdated. 

I'm taking advice in #virtualization <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/772291931433730048> re: vbox@ team membership etc.
